entries.text: You notice a {table:gm/tavern/game-size} playing a card game with a deck of {pick:over one hundred|53|52|24|22} cards. In this game {table:gm/tavern/game-stakes}, and it is known for {table:gm/tavern/game-renown} It is most loved by {table:gm/tavern/game-popular} It was devised {table:gm/tavern/game-origin} {table:gm/tavern/game-cards-rules}

You notice a {table:gm/tavern/game-size} playing a dice game using {pick:a pair of dice|several dice|several dice, pencils, and paper|one or two dice and a board with pieces}. In this game {table:gm/tavern/game-stakes}, and it is known for {table:gm/tavern/game-renown} It is most loved by {table:gm/tavern/game-popular} It was devised {table:gm/tavern/game-origin} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-rules}

You notice a {table:gm/tavern/game-size} playing a board game with sets of {pick:matching|individual} pieces. In this game {table:gm/tavern/game-stakes}, and it is known for {table:gm/tavern/game-renown} It is most loved by {table:gm/tavern/game-popular} It was devised {table:gm/tavern/game-origin} {table:gm/tavern/game-board-rules}
